sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الذَّكاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ جُزْءًا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetna inteligencija postala je dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence has become a part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ فِي الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ وَأَجْهِزَةِ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ovu tehnologiju u pametnim telefonima i računarima.
sentences.translationEn: We use this technology in smartphones and computers.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْبَرَامِجُ النَّاسَ فِي تَنْظِيمِ مَوَاعِيدِهِمْ وَأَعْمَالِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ovi programi pomažu ljudima u organizaciji njihovih termina i poslova.
sentences.translationEn: These programs help people organize their appointments and work.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ الْخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ التِّقْنِيَّةَ سَتَتَطَوَّرُ أَكْثَرَ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci vjeruju da će se tehnologija još više razvijati u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe that technology will develop even more in the future.
